summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new MDM Ingestion Pipeline with 5-step wizard. All backend session endpoints working correctly. Frontend wizard successfully implements all 5 steps with proper navigation and functionality.

minor_issues.issue: Minor test method issue - missing DELETE method support in test runner
minor_issues.impact: Test failure only, endpoint works correctly

functional_notes.behavior: Button correctly disabled when no fields marked for standardization
functional_notes.note: This is expected behavior, not a bug - button should only be enabled when there are fields to process

passed_tests: Backend: Session creation via POST /api/sessions
Backend: File upload to session via POST /api/sessions/{id}/upload
Backend: Manual table creation via POST /api/sessions/{id}/tables
Backend: Column addition via POST /api/sessions/{id}/tables/{table_id}/columns
Backend: Field definitions saving via PUT /api/sessions/{id}/tables/{table_id}/fields
Backend: Session processing via POST /api/sessions/{id}/process
Backend: Domain references via GET /api/domains
Frontend: New Ingestion page loads at /ingest route
Frontend: Sidebar shows New Ingestion link with FolderOpen icon
Frontend: 5-step stepper displays all steps correctly
Frontend: Step 1 (Connect) - Session creation and table management
Frontend: Step 2 (Discover) - Table exploration and column addition
Frontend: Step 3 (Define Fields) - Field type and standardization settings
Frontend: Step 4 (Standardization Gate) - Review standardization choices
Frontend: Step 5 (Domain & Reference) - Domain assignment and processing
Frontend: Stepper navigation between all 5 steps
Frontend: Manual table creation and column addition
Frontend: Domain selection dropdown functionality
Integration: Session creation to processing workflow
Integration: Column detection and type inference from uploaded files
Integration: Field definitions saving and processing through matching engine

success_percentage.backend: 95% (22/23 tests passed - 1 minor test runner issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (All UI components and workflows functioning correctly)
